clean_wax_cluster_with_rod.query: a worker cleans a cluster of small yellow wax parts using a thin handheld brush or rod
clean_wax_cluster_with_rod.prompt:
Event: a worker cleans a cluster of small yellow wax parts using a thin handheld brush or rod
Locate this event in the 20-second video. Return exactly one JSON object: {"start_s": number, "end_s": number}. If the event is absent, return {"start_s": null, "end_s": null}. Times are seconds from video start.

mark_wax_cluster_with_white_tool.query: a worker makes a white mark on the small yellow wax part held in their hands
mark_wax_cluster_with_white_tool.prompt:
Event: a worker makes a white mark on the small yellow wax part held in their hands
Locate this event in the 20-second video. Return exactly one JSON object: {"start_s": number, "end_s": number}. If the event is absent, return {"start_s": null, "end_s": null}. Times are seconds from video start.

place_wax_cluster_on_rack.query: a worker places the cluster of small yellow wax parts onto the tray filled with similar yellow parts
place_wax_cluster_on_rack.prompt:
Event: a worker places the cluster of small yellow wax parts onto the tray filled with similar yellow parts
Locate this event in the 20-second video. Return exactly one JSON object: {"start_s": number, "end_s": number}. If the event is absent, return {"start_s": null, "end_s": null}. Times are seconds from video start.
